must_do.full_text:
Chinese company Lisuan Tech has launched the LX 7G100, a new gaming graphics card that aims to compete with products from NVIDIA

> The GPU comes with 12 GB of GDDR6 memory 

> Early independent benchmarks show real-world gaming performance landing closer to an RTX 3060 level, https://t.co/ikKeYGyN71

must_do.full_text:

China just shipped its first real Nvidia rival.

Performance is solid but still trails the Nvidia RTX 4060.

priority.full_text: The reason agents are so good at Linux is that all 40 million lines of kernel code was part of the pre training. Along with every other open source dependency. This really does make every obscure error message shallow, and the system completely malleable.

angles: 为什么AI在Linux上无所不能？4000万行代码的秘密
Agent破解Linux的真相：预训练数据决定一切
开源代码成为AI超能力的源头
